pluto.name: Pluto TV
pluto.origin: Direct Pluto CDN via service-stitcher.clusters.pluto.tv / amagi.tv
pluto.notes: 300+ channels. Free ad-supported. Direct HLS from Paramount.

plex.name: Plex Live TV
plex.origin: Plex EPG provider CDN via epg.provider.plex.tv / AWS MediaTailor
plex.notes: 600+ channels. Free with Plex account. Direct HLS.

tubi.name: Tubi Live TV
tubi.origin: Tubi CDN via tubitv.com / Fox-owned infrastructure
tubi.notes: 250+ live channels. Free ad-supported. Direct HLS.

xumo.name: Xumo Play
xumo.origin: Xumo/Comcast CDN via frequency.stream / amagi.tv / NBCUniversal
xumo.notes: 350+ channels. Free. Many channels on amagi.tv CDN.

distro.name: Distro TV
distro.notes: Global niche channels. No geo-lock. International.

free_tv_aggregator.name: Free-TV/IPTV (Aggregator)
free_tv_aggregator.origin: Community-curated. Pulls from Pluto, Plex, Roku, Samsung TV Plus, PBS, YouTube live channels
free_tv_aggregator.notes: Quality-curated playlist. HD only. Covers PBS, Pluto, Roku, Samsung TV Plus and OTA channels.
